item_4_tradition_hub_matrix.sql:
SELECT source, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM tradition_hub_matrix
    GROUP BY source
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
item_4_tradition_hub_matrix.filled_cells_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS filled
    FROM tradition_hub_matrix
    WHERE source NOT IN ('temporal_impossibility', 'structural_impossibility')
item_4_tradition_hub_matrix.finding: Only 249 of 1267 filled cells (19.7%) are backed by real evidence. 783 cells (61.8%) are template-stamped from primitive_vector_inference. 235 cells (18.5%) are keyword-inferred. The matrix is majority-synthetic.

item_5_enriched_primitive_vectors.sql_with_vector:
SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM ethnomathematics
    WHERE enriched_primitive_vector IS NOT NULL
item_5_enriched_primitive_vectors.sql_map_1_0:
SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM ethnomathematics
    WHERE enriched_primitive_vector = '[["MAP", 1.0]]'
item_5_enriched_primitive_vectors.sql_map_0_1:
SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM ethnomathematics
    WHERE enriched_primitive_vector = '[["MAP", 0.1]]'
item_5_enriched_primitive_vectors.finding: 44 of 131 traditions (34%) have only 1 primitive. 23 are stamped with generic [[MAP, 1.0]]. Only 54 (41%) have meaningful 3+ primitive vectors. Re-enrichment is needed for 44 traditions.
